behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the exact test string 'calls onChange when cleared with backspace in uncontrolled mode', the test file path, and the jest command used in the acceptance criteria.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instructions describe the bug and hint at areas (handleTimeChange, setTimeString, clear, validity tracking) without dictating exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on observable behavior (onChange called once with '') and that the named test exists/passes; no assertion on internal variable names like wasInvalidBefore.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute jest via subprocess to run actual test cases, not grep file contents.

test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p requires a test to exist AND pass; a stub can't satisfy toHaveBeenCalledWith('') in the uncontrolled-mode flow without the fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The backspace-clearing onChange('') behavior described in instruction is tested by the new jest test; other acceptance criteria (existing tests pass) are covered by full-suite runs.

informative_test_structure.reason: Each test function has a docstring describing its purpose and category (fail-to-pass vs pass-to-pass).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code bug fix, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands appear correct and consistent with the repo layout.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to use-time-picker.ts as a hint area but does not give exact lines or code; this is consistent with the task domain.
